title: 时尚人像摄影：金发女郎暖光大片
author: simeon-sanai
prompt: 一位年轻女性的电影感时尚肖像，她留着波浪短发，刘海轻盈，戴着圆形粉绿色墨镜和银色大耳环，身穿白色高领衫和醒目的黑色羽绒服，嘴唇柔和有光泽，妆容自然，微风轻拂她的秀发，从低角度拍摄，景深较浅，超现实主义，85mm 镜头，f1.8 光圈，温暖的黄金时段阳光，干净的蓝色天空背景，时尚杂志摄影风格，皮肤纹理细节丰富，柔和的阴影，电影级调色，Vogue 风格，超清晰对焦，专业影棚品质。
prompt_en: A cinematic fashion portrait of a young woman with a short wavy bob haircut and wispy bangs, wearing round pink green-tinted sunglasses, hoop silver earrings, a white turtleneck and a bold black puffer jacket, soft glossy lips, natural makeup, wind gently moving her hair, photographed from a low angle, shallow depth of field, ultra realistic, 85mm lens, f1.8, warm golden hour sunlight, clean blue sky background, editorial fashion photography, high detail skin texture, soft shadows, cinematic color grading, Vogue style, ultra sharp focus, professional studio quality

title: 温馨室内静谧时光：人与猫共处书窗旁
author: Cuties
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "从背面角度捕捉到的温馨人物介绍场景。一个人自然地走开，头发略显凌乱。构图不完美，略有裁剪，营造出真实、坦诚的感觉。温暖、舒适的氛围，柔和的自然光。生活方式摄影风格，情感丰富而平静的氛围。",
  "style": "{\"Style\" \"cozy, cinematic, realistic\"}",
  "lighting": "柔和的自然日光",
  "mood": "{\"Mood\" \"calm, intimate, authentic\"}",
  "camera": "背面角度，走开，抓拍",
  "composition": "不完美裁剪，偏离中心构图",
  "quality": "高细节，自然纹理"
}
```

{
  "prompt": "A cozy human intro scene captured from the back angle. A person walking away naturally, with slightly messy hair. The framing is imperfect and slightly cropped, giving an authentic, candid feel. Warm, cozy atmosphere with soft natural light. Lifestyle photography style, emotional and calm mood.",

  "lighting": "soft natural daylight",
  "mood": "{"Mood" "calm, intimate, authentic"}",

}

title: 哈利波特六表情3D卡通合集
author: ChillaiKalan__
prompt: 制作一张 3×2 的拼贴画，包含六幅 [姓名] 的风格化 3D 轶画肖像，每幅肖像采用不同的表情姿势（快乐、惊讶、严肃、可爱、时髦、自信）。画面效果需光滑细腻，搭配柔和的环境光；角色设计简洁明了，每个画面板块的背景颜色明亮醒目。
prompt_en:
3D cartoon style character set using Nano Banana Pro.
Prompt:
3×2 collage of six stylized 3D caricature portraits of [name], each with a different expressive pose (joyful, surprised, serious, cute, sassy, confident). Smooth polished look, soft ambient lighting, clean character design, and bold vibrant backgrounds for each panel.

title: 金发少女日系街拍写真，温柔微笑比摇滚手势

title: 年轻女性镜前自拍，时尚穿搭，室内自然光写真
author: Shreya Yadav

title: 可爱的睡眠报告海报-需上传数据
author: 歸藏(guizang.ai)
prompt:
可爱的睡眠报告海报（Sleep Report Poster）



任务： 海报设计、睡眠数据可视化艺术。 第一步： 分析 [上传的 Apple Watch 睡眠数据截图]，提取清醒、REM、核心、深睡四个阶段的时长比例



画面描述： 画面主体是一个立体的、垂直长方体透明玻璃容器（类似精致的奖杯底座或地质采样管），放置在深邃的纯色背景中。 容器内部由四种不同颜色的微缩景观层层堆叠而成，每一层的垂直厚度必须根据[上传数据]的时长比例来生成（例如：如果核心睡眠时间最长，那么蓝色的层就应该最厚）。



景观分层细节（从上到下）：

顶层（极薄或根据清醒时长）：清醒层 (Wake - 橙色)

表现为干燥的沙漠地表或噪点纹理，象征着意识的活跃与纷乱。

第二层：快速眼动层 (REM - 浅蓝色)

表现为漂浮着云朵、气泡或超现实物体的梦幻天空层。材质通透轻盈。

第三层：核心睡眠层 (Core - 深蓝色)

表现为柔软舒适的海洋球堆积层或层叠的羽绒材质，给人平稳安定的感觉。

底层：深度睡眠层 (Deep - 紫罗兰色)

表现为坚硬、厚重的水晶矿洞或发光的能量块堆叠。这是地基，越厚代表睡眠质量越好。



主角（用户形象）： 在玻璃容器的最顶端边缘（瓶口处），坐着一个Q版 3D 小人。

动作： 小人的双腿自然垂下，悠闲地坐在上面。

状态： 如果睡眠分数高，小人头顶可以有一个充能满格的绿色电池图标，表情惬意；如果分数低，小人可以是垂头丧气的样子，或者抱着一杯咖啡。

装备： 小人手腕上必须佩戴着一只微缩的智能手表。



光影与渲染： 使用 C4D 或 Blender 风格的 3D 渲染。强调玻璃容器的折射率和各层材质的物理质感（沙子、云朵、海洋球、水晶）。背景为高级黑或深夜蓝，打光重点突出容器内部的通透感和底层的微光。



底部排版： 简洁的数据展示。



主标题：昨晚的睡眠地质层 (My Sleep Strata)



核心数据：总睡眠时长 | 睡眠评分



图例：用四个对应颜色的小圆点标注每一层的名称和具体时长。

title: 极速飞溅酸奶盛宴
author: @Taaruk_
prompt: 一个超写实、高速拍摄的美食摄影场景：一只碗悬停半空，食材向外完美爆发飞溅。浓稠酸奶或奶昔基底剧烈泼洒，四周飞舞着水果、浆果、香蕉片、麦片片、燕麦片、坚果、香草、玉米片或墨西哥鳄梨酱（随版本变化）。蜂蜜自木勺滴落，液体飞溅被瞬间凝固，极致锐利细节，光泽质感，鲜艳色彩。干净工作室背景配以大胆纯色（蓝色/粉色/绿色），商业广告风格，微距镜头观感，浅景深，完美布光，超精细食物纹理，电影级构图，8K超写实，高速摄影美学，高端美食商业摄影。
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic, high-speed food photography scene featuring a bowl suspended mid-air with ingredients exploding outward in perfect motion. Creamy yogurt or smoothie base splashing dramatically, surrounded by flying fruits, berries, banana slices, cereal flakes, granola, nuts, herbs, tortilla chips, or guacamole depending on the variation. Honey dripping from a wooden dipper, liquid splashes frozen in time, ultra-sharp details, glossy textures, vibrant colors. Clean studio background with bold solid color (blue / pink / green), commercial advertising style, macro lens look, shallow depth of field, perfect lighting, ultra-detailed food textures, cinematic composition, 8K ultra-realistic, high-speed photography aesthetic, premium food commercial.

title: 与卡通角色共饮茶吃萨莫萨
author: Future AI
prompt: 生成一张超逼真的 4K 照片，照片中我坐在“Furfurinagar 茶馆”，和 Motu、Patlu 以及他们的朋友 Dr. Jhatka 和 Ghasitaram 在一起。每个人都应该在享用茶和萨莫萨，每个人手里都拿着茶杯，Motu 手里拿着萨莫萨。（生成照片中的脸部必须与提供的照片完全匹配，不得有任何改动。）
prompt_en: Generate an ultra-realistic 4K photo of me sitting at "Furfurinagar Tea Shop" with Motu, Patlu, and their friends, Dr. Jhatka and Ghasitaram. Everyone should be enjoying tea and samosas, with tea cups in everyone's hands and samosas in Motu's hand. (The face in the generated photo must match the provided photo exactly, with no changes whatsoever.)

title: 彩色斑马艺术风格转换
author: Narendra Babu ☮️

Zebra in bright vivid colours --ar 1:1 --raw --sref 3289505715 --sw 100 --stylize 300 --v 7

Transform this cartoon image to 4K photo https://t.co/256hRq5e1D

title: 爆炸的食物
author: @icreatelife
prompt: 在具有戏剧性的现代场景中拍摄该产品，并伴随着爆炸性的向外动态排列，主要成分新鲜和原始在产品周围飞舞，表明其新鲜度和营养价值。促销广告镜头，没有文字，强调产品，以关键品牌颜色作为背景。
prompt_en: Photograph the product in a dramatic modern setting, with explosive outward dynamic arrangements. Fresh and raw main ingredients are swirling around the product, highlighting its freshness and nutritional value. This is a promotional advertisement shot without text, emphasizing the product itself, set against a background in key brand colors.

title: Vintage cookbook-style recipe illustration
author: AmirMušić
prompt: Turn this {argument name="dish_en" default="ramen"} into a cute recipe page with illustrations in the style of a hand-drawn vintage cookbook. Surround the main dish with carefully drawn ingredients, including labels, measurements, and utensils like bowls, whisks, or spoons. To create a homey, nostalgic feeling, use textured shading, warm pastel colors, and fine, ink-like outlines. Add handwritten-style recipe text, integrating the ingredients and directions organically into the layout. Make sure the page feels both artistic and educational, combining colorful illustrations with a classic cookbook aesthetic.
prompt_en: Turn this {argument name="dish_en" default="ramen"} into a cute recipe page with illustrations in the style of a hand-drawn vintage cookbook. Surround the main dish with carefully drawn ingredients, including labels, measurements, and utensils like bowls, whisks, or spoons. To create a homey, nostalgic feeling, use textured shading, warm pastel colors, and fine, ink-like outlines. Add handwritten-style recipe text, integrating the ingredients and directions organically into the layout. Make sure the page feels both artistic and educational, combining colorful illustrations with a classic cookbook aesthetic.

title: 在那些充满复古气息的纸张之间……流淌着一首充满奇思妙想的交响乐。
author: BeanieBlossom
prompt: 一位身材矮小的街头音乐家，身高不超过一个葡萄酒瓶的高度，他在巴黎一家舒适的书店里，站在一堆装订精美的旧皮革书籍堆上表演。这位小提琴家穿着一件由各种彩色天鹅绒碎片拼接而成的外套，外套上缀着微型黄铜纽扣；她那蓬乱的银色头发上戴着一顶顶针大小的礼帽，帽上还装饰着孔雀羽毛。金色的午后阳光透过尘埃颗粒洒在房间里，营造出一种温暖、带有蜂蜜色调的氛围。
prompt_en: a diminutive street musician, no taller than a wine bottle, performing atop a stack of vintage leather-bound books in a cozy Parisian bookshop. The tiny violinist wears a patchwork coat of jewel-toned velvet scraps and miniature brass buttons, their wild silver hair crowned with a thimble-sized top hat adorned with peacock feathers. Golden afternoon light streams through dust motes, in the warm, honey-colored atmosphere.

title: Google地图视角下的中土世界
author: @TechHallo
prompt:
行车记录仪谷歌街景拍摄 | [霍比屯街道] | [霍比特人进行园艺和抽烟斗等日常活动] | [晴天]
> [!NOTE]
> **将 [方括号] 中的文字改为需要的地区和天气**
prompt_en:
Dashboard camera Google Street View photography | [Hobbiton Street] | [Hobbits engaging in daily activities such as gardening and smoking pipes] | [Sunny day]
> [!NOTE]
> **Replace the text within [square brackets] with the desired location and weather conditions**

title: 雪夜路灯下，女子张开双臂拥抱飘雪，温暖光影与真实质感交织。
author: Harboriis
prompt: 使用附件图片中的面部，不改变任何面部特征。以纳米级精度保留身份，并精确保持参考图中所有自然的微表情，创建一个超逼真的冬夜场景：人物站在户外，双臂伸展，在发光的街灯下享受着轻轻飘落的雪花。捕捉路灯光晕所营造的温暖、电影般的照明效果，金色的光线穿过雪花散射开来，产生逼真的粒子闪烁和柔和的镜头光晕。人物穿着多层冬装，包括一件长款有纹理的泰迪熊式外套、一条厚围巾和休闲牛仔裤——所有这些都以分子级的织物细节和准确的材质表现进行渲染。被雪覆盖的地面和远处的树木应被附近灯光的漫射光照亮，营造出自然的深度和大气朦胧感。头发应与风和光线进行逼真的互动，捕捉细微的高光，保持正确的阴影位置，灯光前景和较暗背景之间形成暖冷色调对比，以及符合物理原理的光学深度。确保整个场景生动、沉浸、充满欢乐，同时通过智能的上下文感知和微观纹理精度保持高分辨率的真实感。
prompt_en: use the face from the attached image without any changes to facial features. preserve identity with nano-level precision and maintain all natural micro-expressions exactly as in the reference, create an ultra-photorealistic nighttime winter scene featuring the character standing outdoors with arms outstretched, enjoying softly falling snow under a glowing streetlamp. capture the warm, cinematic illumination created by the lamp's halo, with golden light scattering through snowflakes and producing realistic particle shimmer and soft lens bloom, the character wears layered winter clothing, including a long textured teddy-style coat, a thick scarf, and casual jeans-all rendered with molecular fabric detail and accurate material behavior. snow-covered ground and distant trees should be illuminated by ambient spill from nearby lights, creating natural depth and atmospheric haze. hair should interact realistically with wind and light, catching subtle highlights, maintain correct shadow placement, warm-to-cool color contrast between the lamplit foreground and darker background, and true-to-physics optical depth. ensure the entire scene feels lively, immersive, and joyful while preserving high-resolution realism through intelligent context awareness and micro-level texture precision.

title: 电影感冷暖光影人像

title: 多巴胺与精神分裂症关系图解
author: 松井健太郎 睡眠・精神医学 (Kentaro Matsui)
prompt: 我需要一张图解，解释多巴胺和 D2 受体在神经元突触间隙中的作用，以及它们与精神分裂症的关系。抗精神病药物通过阻断 D2 受体发挥作用。请为以下三种情况绘制图解：健康人 | 幻觉和妄想状态 | 服用抗精神病药物后。请生成一张横向图片。
prompt_en:
神経細胞同士のシナプス間隙のドーパミンおよびD2受容体の働きと、統合失調症の関係について図解したいです。抗精神病薬はD2受容体を塞ぐことで薬効を発揮します。これについて、
健康な人 | 幻覚妄想状態 | 抗精神病薬服薬下
の3つで図解してください。横長の画像を生成

title: 苹果风格咖啡馆微缩模型
author: dotey
prompt:
这是一个以3D手办风格呈现的{品牌名称}概念店，其外观设计灵感来源于该品牌最具代表性的产品或包装（例如巨大的{品牌核心产品，如鸡肉桶、汉堡、甜甜圈或烤鸭}）。商店共两层，配备大玻璃窗，可以清晰地展示内部温馨且装饰精美的环境：店内采用{品牌主色调}作为主题，灯光温暖，员工穿着与品牌风格相符的服装。可爱的小人物们在街道上漫步或休息，周围点缀着长椅、路灯和盆栽植物，营造出迷人的都市氛围。整个场景采用Cinema 4D软件以微缩城市景观的风格进行渲染，具有盲盒玩具般的视觉效果，细节丰富且极具真实感；柔和的灯光营造出一种令人放松的午后氛围。 -- 宽高比2:3  

品牌名称：星巴克
prompt_en:
3D chibi-style miniature concept store of {Brand Name}, creatively designed with an exterior inspired by the brand's most iconic product or packaging (such as a giant {brand's core product, e.g., chicken bucket/hamburger/donut/roast duck}). The store features two floors with large glass windows clearly showcasing the cozy and finely decorated interior: {brand's primary color}-themed decor, warm lighting, and busy staff dressed in outfits matching the brand. Adorable tiny figures stroll or sit along the street, surrounded by benches, street lamps, and potted plants, creating a charming urban scene. Rendered in a miniature cityscape style using Cinema 4D, with a blind-box toy aesthetic, rich in details and realism, and bathed in soft lighting that evokes a relaxing afternoon atmosphere. --ar 2:3

Brand name: Starbucks

title: 时尚大片：魅惑金发女郎
author: Dominus the Prompter
prompt: 一张电影风格的高级时装编辑肖像，展现了上传图片中人物的丰盈金色发型、引人注目的蓝色眼睛和专注向上凝视的目光。人物坐着，身穿标志性的亮洋红色露肩罗纹上衣，突显了锁骨线条。场景沐浴在戏剧性、情绪化的电影灯光中，凸显了人物无瑕、光泽的肌肤纹理和深邃的阴影。奢华的氛围造型，使用中画幅胶片拍摄，浅景深，高细节，Vogue 美学，诱惑而华丽。（严格 SFW）
prompt_en: A cinematic, high-fashion editorial portrait of the subject in the uploaded image, featuring her voluminous blonde hairstyle, striking blue eyes, and intense, upward gaze. The subject is seated, wearing the signature bright magenta, off-the-shoulder ribbed top, emphasizing the line of her collarbone. The scene is bathed in dramatic, moody cinematic lighting, highlighting the flawless, glowing skin texture and deep shadows. Luxurious atmospheric styling, shot on medium format film, shallow depth of field, high detail, Vogue aesthetic, seductive and opulent. (Strictly SFW)

title: 湿发女性侧脸特写——自然光泽与冷调光影
author: SimplyAnnisa
prompt: 极端写实的湿景特写肖像。年轻女性侧脸的轮廓（请使用上传的照片作为参考）。乌黑的湿发自然地贴在皮肤上。细小的水珠和薄薄的汗珠在她脸上真实地闪烁着光芒。重点表现她明亮、自然绿色的眼睛及其真实的反光效果，避免过度的高光。嘴唇湿润有光泽，质地柔软自然。采用柔和的灯光和冷色调，背景色为浅灰色或白色（带有模糊效果）。面部特征保持不变。
prompt_en: xtreme wet close-up portrait. Young woman's face in profile (use uploaded pictures for proper reference) Dark wet hair naturally glued to the skin. Fine droplets of water and thin sweat glistening realistically on her face. Focus on bright natural green/hazel eyes with realistic reflection avoid excessive shine. Moist and shiny lips, soft natural texture. Soft lighting and cool shades with a light grey/white bokeh background colour. Keep same facial features.

title: 赛博美学肖像：蓝橙光影下的数字青春梦境
author: Harboriis
prompt: 根据输入照片，创作一张具有电影感、时尚大片风格的半身肖像，营造梦幻般的杂志氛围。使用多重曝光模糊效果，制造重影和垂直条纹。背景为蓝色渐变（从 #0033A0 到 #66CCFF），主体身穿一件宽松的白色 T 恤。运用高对比度照明（冷蓝色调 + 橙色/黄色边缘高光），营造未来感的光芒。表情：中性/内省，眼神柔和。模拟 50-85mm 镜头，f/1.8 光圈，景深较浅。通过运动模糊和色差分离增强效果，同时保持中心细节清晰。目标是营造一种超现实的数字青年氛围，融合极简主义和光影游戏。
prompt_en: Create a cinematic, high-fashion half-length portrait from the input photo with a dreamy editorial vibe. Use multi-exposure blur for ghosting and vertical streaks. Set against a blue gradient background (#0033A0 to #66CCFF), the subject wears an oversized white T-shirt. Apply high-contrast lighting (cool blue wash + orange/yellow edge highlights) for a futuristic glow. Expression: neutral/introspective, eyes softly lit. Simulate 50-85mm lens at f/1.8 with shallow depth of field. Enhance with motion blur and chromatic separation, keeping central details sharp. Aim for a surreal, digital-youth mood blending minimalism and light play.

title: 现实男女化身为漫画角色，未来都市背景下的经典姿势
author: Takuya,中村卓也,나카무라 타쿠야
prompt: 真实的男人和女人被吸入漫画书，变身为漫画人物，并在未来城市背景下摆出图像的最终姿势。
prompt_en: 現実の男女がコミックブックの中に吸い込まれてコミックのキャラクターになり、未来都市を背景にして最後に画像のポーズになる

title: 沙漠色调奢华汽车时尚人像摄影
author: Snow
prompt:
参考：保持男孩的面部特征和纤细优雅的身材。
提示：在温暖的沙漠沙色单色工作室中，一辆豪华跑车旁，一个 20 岁男孩的超逼真电影感肖像。灯光柔和自然，将有机的大地色调与现代奢华融为一体。
服装：一件时尚的浅棕褐色风衣或汽车大衣，内搭米色或淡金色高领毛衣，修身棕色长裤，以及别致的棕色皮革系带鞋。佩戴一块时尚腕表，增添精致感。
姿势：轻轻倚靠在跑车的引擎盖或挡泥板上，一只手插在风衣口袋里，神情温和而自信，若有所思。
[链接]：一辆时尚的哑光金色或沙漠沙色豪华跑车，例如 {"car brand" "LAMBORGHINI"} 或保时捷，反射出柔和的米色、金色和浅棕色渐变。
[链接]：温暖柔和的环境光充满工作室，营造出微妙的高光和自然阴影。空气中一丝灰尘或柔和的薄雾，增添了沙漠风格的单色氛围。
情绪：宁静而精致——自然大地色调与无可否认的电影感融合。
[链接]：单色沙漠沙色编辑摄影。
prompt_en: REFERENCE: KEEP THE SAME BOY’S FACE AND SLIM, ELEGANT BODY.PROMPT: HYPER-REALISTIC CINEMATIC PORTRAIT OF A 20-YEAR-OLD BOY BESIDE A LUXURY SPORTS CAR IN A WARM, DESERT-SAND MONOCHROME STUDIO. THE LIGHTING IS SOFT AND NATURAL, BLENDING ORGANIC EARTH TONES WITH MODERN LUXURY.OUTFIT: A STYLISH LIGHT TAN TRENCH COAT OR CAR COAT OVER A CREAM OR PALE GOLD TURTLENECK SWEATER, SLIM-FIT BROWN TROUSERS, AND CHIC BROWN LEATHER LACE-UP SHOES. A SLEEK WRISTWATCH FOR A TOUCH OF REFINEMENT.POSE: LEANING GENTLY AGAINST THE SPORTS CAR’S HOOD OR FENDER, ONE HAND IN HIS COAT POCKET, WITH A GENTLE YET CONFIDENT AND THOUGHTFUL https://t.co/atBNLFepsH: A SLEEK, MATTE GOLD OR DESERT-SAND COLORED LUXURY SPORTS CAR, SUCH AS A {"car brand" "LAMBORGHINI"} OR PORSCHE, REFLECTING SOFT GRADIENTS OF BEIGE, GOLD, AND FAWN https://t.co/9MvH1nckgu: WARM, SOFT AMBIENT LIGHTING FILLS THE STUDIO, CREATING SUBTLE HIGHLIGHTS AND NATURAL SHADOWS. A HINT OF DUST OR SOFT HAZE IN THE AIR ADDS TO THE DESERT-INSPIRED, MONOCHROME ATMOSPHERE.MOOD: SERENE YET SOPHISTICATED — A CINEMATIC FUSION OF NATURAL EARTH TONES AND UNDENIABLE https://t.co/JoyhzvleuV: MONOCHROME DESERT-SAND EDITORIAL PHOTOGRAPHY.

title: 静奢冬日大片：毛绒质感与自信姿态的高级时尚呈现
author: Banana Prompts
prompt: 静奢冬季大片：毛绒质感、柔和电影感光线、简洁背景，以及自信的姿态，让整个画面尽显奢华。
prompt_en: quiet luxury winter editorial: plush texture,...

title: 2025年AI模型发布路线图
author: PSS
prompt: 与 Nano Banana 合作，为我制作 2025 年的 AI 年表。
prompt_en: peleándome con Nano Banana para que me haga la cronología de la IA de este 2025.

title: 巴黎街头复古酒铺前的沉静女性肖像
author: K
prompt:
超写实、情绪化的巴黎街头编辑肖像，在黄昏/阴天暮色中，一家复古店面外拍摄，电影胶片扫描质感。一位年轻女性（20 岁出头至 20 岁中期），皮肤白皙，身材苗条，齐肩浅棕色/深金色头发，发际线柔和中分/松散分缝，发梢略显蓬乱。表情：平静、疏离、略带疲惫的眼神；嘴唇放松，几乎是噘着嘴；眼睛直视镜头，带着微妙的柔和。姿势：站在店门口附近，肩膀略微前倾，身体呈 3/4 角度；一只手插在外套口袋里（手在口袋开口处可见），另一只手臂放松地放在超大号外套内。构图为中大腿到头部上方一点，垂直肖像。

服装：超大号的 {"coat material" "棕色皮革/飞行员夹克式外套"}，带有磨损的哑光光泽，略带褶皱的质感；非常宽松的版型，落肩设计。衣领：厚实的黑色羊毛/人造毛皮衣领，翻起环绕颈部。无可见的品牌标志，无珠宝强调。

地点/背景细节：

• 她站在一个深绿色/黑色漆木门框的边缘，门框带有老化的铜绿；门框垂直地位于图像的右侧。

• 她身后是一个大型商店橱窗，反光玻璃显示出模糊的街景倒影（树木/天空的形状），但内部物品仍然可见。

• 在橱窗的最上方，大型弧形奶油色字母写着：“VINS DE PROPRIÉTÉS”（法文，弧形横跨玻璃）。

• 橱窗内，左侧可见一张植物海报（绿色叶子插图），因景深/反光而略显模糊。

• 橱窗左下方：一个展示区，有深色表面和小物件（瓶子/类似农产品的形状），光线昏暗。

• 在最右侧边缘，部分在画面内，可见一块黑色菜单/黑板，上面有小小的白色字迹（文字不完全可读），垂直地靠近门框。

灯光：自然环境街灯，柔和而漫射；颧骨和鼻子上柔和的高光；阴影深邃但不死黑。无直射闪光。与较冷的外部相比，商店内部散发出微弱的暖光。

色彩/色调/美学：柔和的棕色、橄榄绿、炭灰色调色板；电影感，略微去饱和；皮肤和商店内部有微妙的温暖“周日休闲”底色；整体黑暗、舒适、雨季冬季氛围（即使没有可见的雨）。存在胶片颗粒，高光处有轻微光晕，轻微暗角，柔和的对比度衰减。背景柔和模糊但可辨认；主体最清晰的部分是脸部和外套衣领。Cooks。

构图/相机：垂直肖像（约 4:5 比例），主体略微偏左居中；橱窗文字占据上方三分之一；门框和菜单板固定右侧三分之一；中景，视线水平，约 50mm 视角，景深浅至适中，边缘有真实的镜头柔和度。

表面/Python 纹理提示：门框上老化的油漆，模糊的橱窗倒影，皮衣褶皱，可见的毛领纤维，细微的毛孔和自然皮肤纹理。
prompt_en:
Ultra-realistic moody Paris street editorial portrait, shot outside a vintage shopfront at dusk/overcast twilight, film-scanned look. A young woman (early–mid 20s), fair skin, slim build, shoulder-length light brown/dark blonde hair with a soft center/loose part, slightly tousled ends. Expression: calm, distant, slightly tired gaze; lips relaxed, almost pouting; eyes looking straight at camera with subtle softness. Pose: standing close to the shop entrance, shoulders slightly forward, body angled 3/4; one hand tucked into the coat pocket (hand visible at pocket opening), the other arm relaxed inside the oversized coat. She is framed from mid-thigh to a little above head, vertical portrait.

Wardrobe: oversized {"coat material" "brown leather/bomber-style coat"} with a worn matte sheen, slightly wrinkled texture; very large fit with dropped shoulders. Collar: thick black shearling/faux-fur collar folded up around the neck. No visible logos, no jewelry emphasis.

Location / Background details:

•She stands at the edge of a dark green/black painted wooden doorframe with aged patina; the frame runs vertically on the right side of the image.

•Behind her is a large shop window with reflective glass showing faint street reflections (trees/sky shapes), but interior objects remain visible.

•At the very top of the window, large curved cream lettering reads: “VINS DE PROPRIÉTÉS” (French text, arched across the glass).

•Inside the shop window, a botanical poster is visible on the left side (green leaves illustration), slightly blurred due to depth/reflection.

•Lower left inside the window: a display area with dark surfaces and small objects (bottles/produce-like shapes), dimly lit.

•On the far right edge, partially inside the frame, a black menu/chalkboard with small white writing is visible (text not fully readable), aligned vertically near the doorframe.

Lighting: natural ambient street light, soft and diffused; gentle highlights on cheekbones and nose; shadows are deep but not crushed. No direct flash. The shop interior glows faintly warm compared to the cooler exterior.

Color / Tone / Aesthetic: muted brown, olive-green, charcoal palette; cinematic, slightly desaturated; subtle warm sundayfunday undertone in skin and shop interior; overall dark, cozy, rainy-winter vibe (even if no rain visible). Film grain present, slight halation on highlights, mild vignette, soft contrast roll-off. Background softly blurred but readable; subject sharpest point is face and coat collar. Cooks. 

Composition / Camera: vertical portrait (approx 4:5 feel), subject centered slightly left; window text occupies upper third; doorframe and menu board anchor the right third; medium shot at eye level, ~50mm perspective, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, realistic lens softness toward edges.

Surface / python Texture cues: aged paint on doorframe, smudged window reflections, leather coat creases, fur collar fibers visible, fine pores and natural skin text
